description: Coordinator agents can 'git commit' runtime state (.overstory/, .mulch/) but CANNOT 'git push' — a harness hook blocks it with 'coordinator agents cannot modify files'. This contradicts the documented completion-protocol which lists 'git push'. Effect: after committing runtime-state sync, local main is left ahead of origin/main.
resolution: Commit runtime state and stop; do not retry the push. Let a non-coordinator session or the human push. Do not treat the ahead-of-origin state as an error.
